description: You are a structural biologist researching protein structures at the RCSB Protein Data Bank (rcsb.org). For the structures '4HHB' (Human Deoxyhemoglobin), '1MBN' (Sperm Whale Myoglobin), and '1FDH' (Human Fetal Deoxyhemoglobin), create a JSON report at '~/Documents/protein_structures.json' using the PDB IDs as keys. The report must include the 'title', 'classification', 'method', and 'resolution_angstroms' (as a number) for each. Download the '4HHB' structure file in PDB format to your Downloads folder and create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Protein Research' containing bookmarks for the summary pages of all three structures.
